title: High-throughput cloning and expression library creation for functional proteomics.
author: Festa F Steel J Bian X Labaer J
content: S-EPMC4369776 PMC4369776 High-throughput cloning and expression library creation for functional proteomics. The study of protein function usually requires the use of a cloned version of the gene for protein expression and functional assays. This strategy is particularly important when
